title: 有馬記念の後に・ちがうのちがうの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara somehow ends up placing first in the
fearsome Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Haru Urara doesn't feel like she won on
her own merits and is dissatisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to truly enjoy this special race, she
proclaims that she'll re-enter it next year.
